metadata.description: Guardrails for agent memory, context, and truthfulness — plus the skills it coordinates, installable from one marketplace.

plugins.name: claude-guardrails-skill
plugins.description: Memory discipline, fact verification, and a session-start reminder. Ships its own SessionStart hook.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core method base: TDD, debugging, brainstorming, writing-plans, code review, verification-before-completion.

plugins.name: planning-with-files
plugins.description: Live working memory on disk (task_plan/findings/progress); survives context compaction and /clear.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Terse, low-token communication style (use at lite intensity).
